description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build that runs on push to master and pull requests to master. The workflow has four jobs: build, linux-coverage, bindings, and conan. The build job uses a matrix strategy to run on multiple operating systems with different presets, installing dependencies, configuring, building, and running tests. The linux-coverage job runs on ubuntu-22.04, installing dependencies, configuring, building, running tests, processing coverage info, and submitting to codecov.io. The bindings job runs on windows-latest, configuring, building, and running tests. The conan job runs on ubuntu-22.04, installing dependencies, configuring, building, and running tests.
